description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a predominantly black body accented by sharp orange highlights along the nose, wingtips, and tail. The wings are sharply swept back and seamlessly integrated into the fuselage, giving it a futuristic, delta-wing appearance. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanking a vertical stabilizer with an orange-tipped fin. The cockpit is positioned forward and features a streamlined, enclosed canopy with a slightly tinted appearance. The overall design is aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and minimal protrusions, suggesting high-speed capability. The airplane's undercarriage is not visible, indicating either retracted or flush landing gear.
description: A futuristic black airplane with swept delta wings, orange accents, and twin rear jet engines. The design is highly aerodynamic with a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply swept delta wing, orange-tipped nose, and the twin rear jet engines with the vertical stabilizer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, swept wingspan, pointed nose, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engine placement and the orange tail accent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin jet exhausts, vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the delta wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible winglets and a continuous, blended wing-fuselage design.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted on either side of the vertical stabilizer.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers, integrated into the delta wing structure.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
